name: Xave Finance
report: The DaoModule contract was compromised due to misconfiguration: the questionCooldown and minimumBond were set to 0 by default. The attacker called executeProposalWithIndex to invoke mint(0x0f44f3489D17e42ab13A6beb76E57813081fc1E2, 100000000000000000000000000000000) and transferOwnership(0x0f44f3489D17e42ab13A6beb76E57813081fc1E2).
